text:
is an artbook of the EVANGELION 100.0 exhibition. It was edited by RADIO EVA and published by Parco Publishing on 01 May 2013. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4865060111 

Overview

Started in November 2012 and mobilized 30,000 people in Nagoya, Umeda, and Shibuya. An official book is now available from the exhibition EVANGELION 100.0, which is currently on the way around the country! From among the many collaborations that Evangelion has done in the past, The exhibition EVANGELION 100.0 exhibited approximately 2000 items selected from the perspective of the official project, RADIO EVA, the Evangelion New Theatrical Edition. In addition to the 100 valuable items and commentary, interviews with product personnel who have attracted attention are also posted by consolidating the messages sent by Evangelion to society in the form of things, events, and various campaigns. A permanent preservation version that takes a bird's-eye view of a media mix filled with 17 years of Evangelion!
